items.title: BURU Stock Set To Open At Record Low After Pricing Of Public Offering – Retail Signals Further Downside
items.description: The company announced pricing for a $12 million public offering at an 8% discount to Thursday’s close.

items.title: CPI Report: Annual Inflation Rate Comes In At 2.4% In January, Below Wall Street Expectations
items.description: Consumer price index (CPI) rose 0.2% in January on a seasonally adjusted basis, after rising 0.3% in December.

items.title: Alibaba Could Join Pentagon’s Watchlist Of Companies With China Military Ties: Report
items.description: According to a Reuters report, the update could happen as early as Friday, increasing U.S. scrutiny of Chinese tech firms.

items.title: Pinterest's Fundamentals Are ‘Clearly Deteriorating,’ Say Analysts: PINS Stock Tumbles 21% Pre-Market Following Q4 Revenue Miss
items.description: Pinterest reported earnings per share of $0.67 on revenue of $1.32 billion, compared to Wall Street estimates of an EPS of $0.67 on revenue of $1.33 b...

items.title: AAP Stock Surges 9% Pre-Market – What’s Fueling the Rally?
items.description: Comparable store sales rose 1.1% in the fourth-quarter with a revenue of $2 billion and adjusted earnings per share of $0.86.
